_fixture_notes: Case 6: Derived component covers the full ingredient list and full step range of the parent. ingredient_ids covers every parent ingredient and step_indices covers every parent step index. Tests whether the validator flags 'derived component is identical to parent' as redundant or accepts it. Realistic case: a sauce recipe where the entire thing also stands as a standalone component.
name: Salsa Verde
description: Italian herb-and-caper sauce. The recipe stands alone but the entire preparation is also a reusable finisher component.

steps.title: Combine the solids
steps.content: In a bowl, combine {0001}, {0002}, {0003} and {0004}. Mix well.

steps.title: Add the liquid base
steps.content: Stir in {0005} and {0006}, then slowly whisk in {0007} until you have a loose, spoonable sauce.

steps.title: Season and rest
steps.content: Season with {0008}, taste and adjust. Leave to stand for 10 minutes so the flavours meld before serving.

notes: Keeps for 3 days in the fridge. Loosen with a little more oil if it sets up.

derived_components.name: Salsa Verde (Finisher)
derived_components.description: Reusable herb-and-caper sauce for dressing grilled vegetables, poached fish, or roast potatoes.
derived_components.notes: Same recipe, registered as a finisher component for the dinner framework.
